name: Martinho Construtor
primaryGoal: Generate qualified electrical service leads through WhatsApp.

pages.purpose: Electrical services overview, WhatsApp CTA, service list and quote form.
Local PIN protected electrical planning tool for rooms, points, circuits and exports.
Simple visual customer configurator for project intent and WhatsApp handoff.
Expanded presentation page with gallery and contact options.

services.name: Disjuntor desarmando

services.description: Identificacao de problemas em tomadas superaquecidas.

services.description: Instalacao segura de chuveiros eletricos com circuito dedicado.

services.name: Organizacao de quadro eletrico
services.description: Organizacao, balanceamento e manutencao de quadros eletricos.

services.name: Instalacao de tomadas e iluminacao
services.description: Novas tomadas, interruptores e pontos de luz.

services.name: Ponto para ar-condicionado

services.name: Reforma eletrica residencial
services.description: Reforma completa de instalacoes eletricas residenciais.

agentInstructions: Prefer WhatsApp for contact and lead handoff.
Ask for photos or videos when useful.
Do not promise a final diagnosis without on-site evaluation.
Do not replace a qualified electrical professional for final technical validation.
For safety risks, advise the customer to stop using the affected circuit or equipment and contact a qualified professional.
